{{- /* Open Graph + Twitter Card tags. Rendered per page from head.html (cached by .Path), so values vary per page. Share image: per-page front matter `images` (first entry) if set, otherwise the site image stamped with the overlay and resized to a 1200 square via img/overlay.html. */ -}} {{- $title := cond .IsHome site.Title (printf "%s | %s" .Title site.Title) }} {{- $description := or .Description site.Params.description }} {{- $image := "" }} {{- with .Params.images }} {{- $image = index . 0 | absURL }} {{- else }} {{- with partial "img/overlay.html" (dict "image" site.Params.huggingface.images.site "size" 1200) }} {{- $image = .Permalink }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- with $image }} {{- end }} {{- with $image }} {{- end }}
